description: Style NoteThe summer season offers endless choices when it comes to styling your look. This dress from wills lifestyle combines subtle colours with simple styling add ons which will give you a fashionable look. Pair it with ballerina flats or sandals for a day out with your friends or for a family Sunday brunch. Product DetailsWhite dress, has a boat neck, cap sleeves, panels with pin tuck details in front and back, pint tucks around the waist, two insert pockets below the waist on the sides in front, and a lining insideMaterial and CareOuter: 100% ramie Lining: 100% cottonMachine wash coldDo not bleachLine dryWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
